zh.Fressingfield, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可福雷辛費爾德
zh.Topcroft, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可托普可洛福特
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Brewes於大約1441年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir Thomas Brewse37歲，母親Joan Calthorpe31歲。他與Elizabeth Hopton在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1489年10月28日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可福雷辛費爾德。

zh-hans.Fressingfield, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可福雷辛費爾德
zh-hans.Topcroft, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可托普可洛福特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Brewes于大约1441年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Brewse37岁，母亲Joan Calthorpe31岁。他与Elizabeth Hopton在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1489年10月28日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可福雷辛費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Brewes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Claus, Erna, Frieda, Guenter, Horst, Klaus, Wolfram.

English (London): either a French habitational name from Dreux in Eure-et-Loir, or a habitational name from a place in France meaning ‘streams’, for example Rieux, in Marne and in Seine-Maritime, with fused preposition de. Compare Druce .
Danish, Dutch, and German: from a vernacular form of the personal name   Andreas  .

variants.name: Druce
meanings: English: variant of   Drewes  , a surname of French origin.
Possibly an altered form of Dutch and German   Drewes  .

variants.name: Draves
meanings: English: variant of Drave, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a topographic name denoting someone who lived ‘(by the) drove’, a track along which livestock were driven, from Middle English drove, drave (Old English drāf ‘drove, cattle track’). This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Brewes was born about 1441, in England, his father, Sir Thomas Brewse, was 37 and his mother, Joan Calthorpe, was 31. He married Elizabeth Hopton in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 28 October 1489, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Brewes est né environ 1441, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Brewse, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joan Calthorpe, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hopton à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 28 octobre 1489, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Brewes um 1441 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Brewse 37 und seine Mutter Joan Calthorpe 31. Er hat in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Hopton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Oktober 1489 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Brewes è nato il circa 1441 nel England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Brewse, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Joan Calthorpe, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Hopton nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 28 ottobre 1489, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Brewesが約1441年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Brewseは37歳，母Joan Calthorpeは31歳であった。イギリスイギリスノーフォルクでElizabeth Hoptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1489年10月28日に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Brewes(이)가 대략 1441년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Brewse(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Calthorpe(은)는 31세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Elizabeth Hopton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 10월 28일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프레징필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Brewes nasceu aproximadamente 1441, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Brewse, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Joan Calthorpe, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hopton em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de outubro de 1489, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Brewes родился около 1441 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Brewse было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Calthorpe, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hopton в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 28 октября 1489 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Brewes nació aproximadamente 1441, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Brewse, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Joan Calthorpe, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Hopton en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de octubre de 1489, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
